locations.name: 村口
locations.description: 雨后灰白的村庄大门，火把未熄，泥泞路面
locations.lighting: 雨后灰白晨光，火把未熄

visual.description: medieval village gate at rainy dawn, torches flickering, stone walls, muddy path

locations.name: 酒馆
locations.description: 中世纪酒馆，壁炉暖光与窗外冷色天光

visual.description: cozy medieval tavern interior, wooden tables, fireplace, warm lantern light

locations.name: 仓库
locations.description: 阴暗的商人仓库，破损货箱与泥脚印
locations.lighting: 高处小窗漏下的斜光，角落昏暗

visual.description: dark abandoned merchant warehouse, broken crates, cobwebs, dusty windows

locations.name: 森林小路
locations.description: 浓雾森林小径，折断树枝与车辙

visual.description: dark forest trail, twisted trees, fog, bandit ambush atmosphere
